---
title: "Summer School 2025"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
toc: false
subtitle: "Intensive Two-Week Technology Program"
description: "Enroll in the chen.ist Summer School 2025, an intensive two-week technology program running August 1-15 at Tech Campus, Bucharest."
date: "2025-08-01"
enddate: "2025-08-15"
location: "Tech Campus, Bucharest"
category: "summer-school"
image: "/assets/images/summer-school.jpg"
registration_date: "2025-05-01"
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Summer School <span class="gr">2025</span></h1>
    <p>Intensive Two-Week Technology Program</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="event-dates">
      <span class="badge bg-primary">August 1-15, 2026</span>
      <div class="event-actions">
        <a href="/events/ical/summer-school-2025.ics" class="m-bo btn-sm" download>
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Add to Calendar
        </a>
        <a href="/events/pdfs/summer-school-2025.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" download>
          <i class="bi bi-file-pdf"></i> Download PDF
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="event-location">
      <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Tech Campus, Bucharest
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">

<h2>Event Overview</h2>

<p>The Summer School 2025 is an intensive two-week program focused on cutting-edge technologies and practical skills development. Perfect for students and professionals looking to enhance their technical capabilities in a condensed, immersive format.</p>

<h2>Program Details</h2>

<p>Over the course of two weeks, participants will:</p>

<ul>
<li>Engage with industry experts through daily workshops and lectures</li>
<li>Work on real-world projects in small teams</li>
<li>Build a comprehensive portfolio of technical work</li>
<li>Network with peers and potential employers</li>
<li>Receive personalized mentorship and feedback</li>
</ul>

<h2>Curriculum</h2>

<h3>Week 1: Fundamentals &amp; Exploration</h3>

<table class="table">
<thead><tr><th>Day</th><th>Morning</th><th>Afternoon</th></tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td>Monday</td><td>Opening Ceremony &amp; Introduction</td><td>Technology Landscape Overview</td></tr>
<tr><td>Tuesday</td><td>Web Development Foundations</td><td>Responsive Design Workshop</td></tr>
<tr><td>Wednesday</td><td>Backend Architecture</td><td>Database Design Principles</td></tr>
<tr><td>Thursday</td><td>API Development</td><td>Integration Challenges</td></tr>
<tr><td>Friday</td><td>Cloud Infrastructure</td><td>Deployment Strategies</td></tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<h3>Week 2: Advanced Topics &amp; Project Work</h3>

<table class="table">
<thead><tr><th>Day</th><th>Morning</th><th>Afternoon</th></tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td>Monday</td><td>AI &amp; Machine Learning Intro</td><td>Data Analysis Workshop</td></tr>
<tr><td>Tuesday</td><td>Applied ML Techniques</td><td>Computer Vision Labs</td></tr>
<tr><td>Wednesday</td><td>Security Fundamentals</td><td>Ethical Hacking Workshop</td></tr>
<tr><td>Thursday</td><td>Project Work</td><td>Project Work</td></tr>
<tr><td>Friday</td><td>Final Presentations</td><td>Closing Ceremony &amp; Networking</td></tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<h2>Who Should Attend</h2>

<ul>
<li>Students pursuing degrees in computer science or related fields</li>
<li>Early-career professionals looking to expand their skill set</li>
<li>Career changers transitioning into tech roles</li>
<li>Educators seeking to update their technical knowledge</li>
</ul>

<h2>Registration Information</h2>

<p>Registration opens on May 1, 2025. Early registration is recommended as spaces are limited to 50 participants to ensure a high-quality, personalized experience.</p>

  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Join Us for Summer School 2025</h2>
    <p>Immerse yourself in an intensive learning experience that will transform your technical skills and career prospects.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b">Register Interest</a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">

<h2>Frequently Asked Questions</h2>

<h3>What is the cost to attend?</h3>
<p>The full program fee is &euro;1,500, which includes all materials, lunches, and special events. Early bird registrants receive a 15% discount. Limited scholarships are available for students.</p>

<h3>Is accommodation provided?</h3>
<p>Accommodation is not included in the program fee. However, we can assist with recommendations and have partnered with nearby hotels to offer discounted rates.</p>

<h3>What level of technical knowledge is required?</h3>
<p>Participants should have basic programming experience (in any language) and familiarity with web concepts. A pre-course assessment and learning resources will be provided to help you prepare.</p>

<h3>Will I receive a certificate?</h3>
<p>Yes, all participants who complete the program will receive a certificate of completion. Additionally, top performers will receive special recognition.</p>

<h3>Can I attend virtually?</h3>
<p>The program is designed as an in-person experience to maximize hands-on learning and networking. However, select lectures may be available for remote viewing.</p>

  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
